evals.expected_output: Use joinSub, whereExists, selectRaw with bindings; avoid N+1 with eager loading; add database indexes on join/aggregate columns; use DB::raw() with bindings never string concatenation

evals.prompt: Use Redis caching with Cache::remember in Laravel
evals.expected_output: Cache::remember('posts.all', 3600, fn() => Post::all()); use Cache::tags(['posts'])->remember() for grouped invalidation; never use Cache::flush(); requires Redis driver

evals.prompt: Set up read/write database splitting in Laravel
evals.expected_output: Configure 'read' and 'write' keys in config/database.php mysql connection; Laravel automatically routes SELECT to read, INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE to write connection; no code changes needed

evals.prompt: Use Cache::tags for grouped cache invalidation in Laravel
evals.expected_output: Cache::tags(['posts', 'user:1'])->put('key', $data, 3600); invalidate all posts cache: Cache::tags(['posts'])->flush(); requires Redis or Memcached; never use Cache::flush() globally

evals.prompt: Advanced SQL with joinSub or whereExists in Laravel
evals.expected_output: Use DB::table()->joinSub($subquery, 'alias', 'a.id', '=', 'alias.id'); use whereExists(fn($q) => $q->select(DB::raw(1))->from(...)) instead of whereIn for correlated subqueries

evals.prompt: Avoid N+1 query issues with subqueries in Laravel
evals.expected_output: Use withCount(), withSum(), withAvg() for aggregates instead of loading collection; use addSelect with DB::raw subquery; enable preventLazyLoading() in dev to catch issues

should_not_trigger: Cache queries in NestJS with Redis
Use Eloquent for basic CRUD operations
Configure PostgreSQL connection in a Go service
Database optimization in Spring Boot with JPA
